2006 Portuguese film

| Blood Curse | |
| --- | --- |
| Theatrical release poster | |
| Directed by | [Tiago Guedes](/wiki/Tiago_Guedes "Tiago Guedes") [Frederico Serra](/w/index.php?title=Frederico_Serra&action=edit&redlink=1 "Frederico Serra (page does not exist)") |
| Starring | [Adriano Luz](/wiki/Adriano_Luz "Adriano Luz") [Manuela Couto](/wiki/Manuela_Couto "Manuela Couto") [Sara Carinhas](/w/index.php?title=Sara_Carinhas&action=edit&redlink=1 "Sara Carinhas (page does not exist)") [José Afonso Pimentel](/w/index.php?title=Jos%C3%A9_Afonso_Pimentel&action=edit&redlink=1 "José Afonso Pimentel (page does not exist)") |

| Running time | 97 minutes |
| Country | Portugal |
| Language | Portuguese |

***Blood Curse*** ([Portuguese](/wiki/Portuguese_language "Portuguese language"): ***Coisa Ruim***) is a 2006 Portuguese supernatural [horror film](/wiki/Horror_film "Horror film") directed by [Tiago Guedes](/wiki/Tiago_Guedes "Tiago Guedes") and [Frederico Serra](/w/index.php?title=Frederico_Serra&action=edit&redlink=1 "Frederico Serra (page does not exist)"), which talks about [demonic](/wiki/Demon "Demon") [possession](/wiki/Spirit_possession "Spirit possession"), [exploring beliefs](/wiki/Trust_(social_science) "Trust (social science)"), [superstitions](/wiki/Superstition "Superstition"), [skepticism](/wiki/Skepticism "Skepticism"), [fears](/wiki/Fears "Fears") and [suspicions](/wiki/Suspicion_(emotion) "Suspicion (emotion)"), in the context of a small [village](/wiki/Village "Village"). It has been considered the first [horror](/wiki/Horror_film "Horror film") [feature film](/wiki/Feature_film "Feature film") from Portugal.

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Blood_Curse_(film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This article's [plot summary](/wiki/Wikipedia:How_to_write_a_plot_summary "Wikipedia:How to write a plot summary") **needs to be improved**. Please help [do so](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Blood_Curse_(film)&action=edit). Relevant discussion may be found on the [talk page](/wiki/Talk:Blood_Curse_(film) "Talk:Blood Curse (film)"). *(December 2022)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

Xavier Oliveira Monteiro ([Adriano Luz](/wiki/Adriano_Luz "Adriano Luz")) is a botanical researcher and university professor. He lives with his wife, children and a baby grandson in an apartment in the center of [Lisbon](/wiki/Lisbon "Lisbon"). One day Xavier receives news of the death of his uncle, owner of a family manor in a village in the municipality of [Seia](/wiki/Seia "Seia"). To publish a study on the [flora](/wiki/Flora "Flora") of Beira Interior, he decides to move with his family to the house. On arriving at the village, he becomes friends with the locals, whom he perceives to be very superstitious and believers in matters related to the occult. At first Xavier tries to ignore it, but strange events with no logical explanation, but coinciding with some local beliefs begin to occur to him and his family. Xavier decides to investigate these beliefs to find some explanation. It is then that Vicente, a former village priest ([José Pinto](/w/index.php?title=Jos%C3%A9_Pinto_(actor)&action=edit&redlink=1 "José Pinto (actor) (page does not exist)")) reveals to him something dark and macabre that happened in the past, and which gave rise to a terrible [curse](/wiki/Curse "Curse") that plagues the village and which is directly related to Xavier and his family.

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Blood_Curse_(film)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Reception")]

It won the 2006 [Portuguese Golden Globe](/wiki/Golden_Globes_(Portugal) "Golden Globes (Portugal)") for Best Film.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
